name: resourcepack-and-shader-setup
description: Getting resource packs and shaders to actually show up in-game — the loader-chain check and which menu enables them. This is the outcome/where-to-enable side, not the install tooling. Use when the user wants shaders/packs to appear or asks where to turn them on ("光影","材质包","资源包","iris","怎么开光影"); the actual search/install/delete tool calls and the loader prerequisite live in the operation skill resourcepacks-and-shaders.
body:
# Resource packs & shaders

Goal: the pack/shader actually shows up in-game — that means matching the game version, and for
shaders, having the right loader (Iris/OptiFine) installed first. See `resourcepacks-and-shaders`
for the tool calls: searching, installing, checking loader compatibility, avoiding the OptiFine
vs Sodium/Iris conflict.

## Where to enable them in-game (not covered by the operation skill)
- Shaders: 视频设置 → 光影 (Iris) / Shaders (OptiFine).
- Resource packs: 选项 → 资源包.
